src: Geezap is an AI-powered job aggregation platform built with Laravel that unifies job listings from LinkedIn, Upwork, Indeed, and ZipRecruiter. Features include smart job matching, automated cover letter generation, and application tracking.
ja: Geezapは、LinkedIn・Upwork・Indeed・ZipRecruiterの求人をまとめるLaravel製AI駆動の求人集約プラットフォーム。スマートな求人マッチング・自動カバーレター生成・応募追跡機能を搭載
